summary: Iteration 12 — verified Phase 1 v37c media-optionality changes. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passing covering (a) /submit finalize succeeding with ZERO media when form_data is complete, (b) /submit finalize still 400ing on missing height/location/availability, (c) /apply finalize 400ing when no image is uploaded, (d) /apply finalize succeeding with exactly 1 image and NO video, (e) admin login + projects/applications listing regression, (f) prefill endpoint regression. Frontend label correctness verified at source level (grep) — UI labels match spec.
critical_code_review_comments: submissions.py line 449-454: empty comment block is fine, but consider also noting that the 'first_time finalize' code path now creates a Talent record even with zero media — this is intentional per spec and works correctly.

applications.py line 250: the 'isinstance' check for str fields is mixed — `not (fd.get(field) or '').strip() if isinstance(fd.get(field), str) else not fd.get(field)` is hard to read; consider extracting a small helper. Currently functions correctly.
Frontend ApplicationPage.jsx line 712 uses `(optional)` for Intro Video — visually subtle but matches spec. SubmissionPage.jsx labels say 'Optional (recommended)' — consistent.

success_rate.frontend: Source-verified (grep) — labels match spec. Live UI deep-fill flow not exercised due to progressive form.

seed_data_creation: Test submissions/applications created against project slug 'pantaloons-with-a-celebrity-11ccd4' (the only existing project). All test data is prefixed TEST_<scenario>_<random>@example.com. Cleanup not performed — drafts/submissions are harmless and can be filtered by TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project slug for testing /submit flow on this env is 'pantaloons-with-a-celebrity-11ccd4', NOT 'casting-deck-pro' (that's the subdomain). The test fixture `slug` auto-discovers it via admin-authenticated /api/projects. The /apply page form is progressive (first_name/last_name only render after email is typed) — direct Playwright .fill() on `input` selector finds only 1 input; use page.get_by_label() OR step through wait_for_selector after each fill.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verified working as intended. Both backend success-with-zero-media and apply-requires-1-image behaviors are correctly implemented per spec.
